name: Kaja
intro: Kaja, the Nazar King, is a hero in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang .

abilities.name: Wrath Sanction
abilities.description: Buff Kaja achieves Wrath Sanction every 6 seconds. His next Basic Attack will send a lightning to enemies, dealing 100 (+100% Total Magic Power) (+target's 4% Total HP) Magic Damage and paralyzing them. The lightning will hit enemies nearby as well (up to 3 times). increases damage by 200% of target's Max HP on minions and creeps . Paralyzing: Slows enemies [by approx. 90% for approx. 0.4 second] and reduces their damage by 8% (up to 4 stacks) for 4 seconds. Skill terms Magic Basic Attack Deal Magic DMG to enemies. It can trigger ATK Effect and Magic Lifesteal. Max HP The maximum HP currently can have.

abilities.name: Ring of Order
abilities.description: AOE Slow Kaja releases a Ringed Electric Blade that quickly expands and contracts, dealing 135 (+70% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage to enemies hit on its way out and back and paralyzing them. Each time an enemy is hit by the Electric Blade, Kaja's HP is restored by 100 (reduced to 30% after multiple hits). Skill terms Magic Skill Deal Magic DMG to enemies. Triggers Spell Vamp. Movement Speed Movement Speed on the battlefield. Usually Calculated and Actual Movement Speed is equal. But when Movement Speed is below 230 or over 420 both Slowdown and Speedup Effect will decay. Calculated Movement Speed = Basic Movement Speed × (100% + All Speedup Effect% - All Slowdown Effect%). CD The time needed for casting the skill one more time, which can be affected by CD Reduction (unless otherwise stated).

abilities.name: Lightning Bomb
abilities.description: Mobility Damage Kaja dashes in the target direction while leaving 3 Lightning Bombs along the way. The Bombs will explode upon enemy contact, dealing 200 (+80% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage to the enemy and paralyzing them. Skill terms Blink Movement ability that can pass through obstacles. Magic Skill Deal Magic DMG to enemies. Triggers Spell Vamp.

abilities.name: Divine Judgement
abilities.description: Kaja deals 300 (+100% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage to a designated enemy hero, suppresses and paralyzes them for 1.5 seconds. During the suppression, Kaja can drag the enemy hero along with him. Skill terms Suppressed A state that prevents a target from moving, attacking, or using skills. This is an advanced stunning effect that interrupts all skills, ignores resilience, and can’t be removed. Magic Defense Reduces Magic Damage taken. Actual Magic Damage taken = Magic Damage dealt by enemy 120/(120 + Magic Defense). Magic Defense will be affected by the enemy's Magic PEN, but will not be lower than -60. Magic Skill Deal Magic DMG to enemies. Triggers Spell Vamp.
